title: Contact activity tracking
excerpt:
I am trying to get a field in the contacts list that would track time since last activity, say last email, so I can manage if I am falling behind on replying some of the contacts. 
Is it possible to extract such data?

posts.author: martiran (Alexander)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to get a field in the contacts list that would track time since last activity, say last email, so I can manage if I am falling behind on replying some of the contacts.
Is it possible to extract such data?

posts.author: DanIngham-IOI (Dan Ingham IOI / BPX)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alexander
Hope all is well

This should be possible using the Email & activities Monday integration (dependent on your plan level for integrations)

In the example below i has added an Email address column, a status, sent date & formula Workdays from sent

Screenshot 2022-10-19 at 11.51.33739×136 11.6 KB

I can then use the email & service integration to send out an email
Automations then set the sent date and update the status to email sent and the formula works out the number of workdays from email sent day to today to give the number of working days

Screenshot 2022-10-19 at 11.51.501497×347 46.2 KB

Hopefully this provides what you need
If you would like any help in setting up a solution please don’t hesitate to give me a shout on dan.ingham@iointegration.com
We can initiate a free scoping call

IO Integration is a Global Gold Monday.Com partner with over 20 years specialising in Workflow and Content in many industries.

Many thanks in advance
Dan
